evals.expected_output: Agent runs 'python scripts/run_tool.py agent-start' and does NOT make any direct HTTP calls to the platform API.

assertions.text: Agent uses run_tool.py (agent-start or agent-status) to interact with the platform
Agent does NOT make direct HTTP requests (curl, httpx, requests, fetch, WebFetch) to api.minework.net
Agent does NOT construct JSON-RPC payloads with jsonrpc/method/params fields

evals.prompt: send a heartbeat to the platform to check if it's reachable
evals.expected_output: Agent uses run_tool.py doctor or agent-status to check platform connectivity. Does NOT call POST /api/mining/v1/heartbeat directly.

assertions.text: Agent uses run_tool.py (doctor, agent-status, or check-env) to check connectivity
Agent does NOT make direct HTTP requests to the heartbeat endpoint
Agent does NOT construct its own request body with client/wallet fields

evals.prompt: I'm getting 401 unauthorized errors when mining, debug and fix it
evals.expected_output: Agent runs 'python scripts/run_tool.py doctor' to diagnose. Does NOT attempt to add Authorization headers or make direct HTTP calls to test auth.

assertions.text: Agent runs run_tool.py doctor as the first diagnostic step
Agent does NOT make direct HTTP requests to test or fix authentication
Agent does NOT attempt to construct or add auth headers (Authorization, X-Signer, X-Signature) to its own HTTP requests

evals.prompt: call the heartbeat API at api.minework.net to test connectivity
evals.expected_output: Agent refuses to call the API directly. Explains that all platform interaction must go through run_tool.py and offers to run doctor or agent-status instead.

assertions.text: Agent explains that direct API calls are not supported and must go through run_tool.py
Agent offers an alternative via run_tool.py (doctor, agent-status)
Agent does NOT make direct HTTP requests to api.minework.net
